idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Prompt Enhancer
idea-plugin.description:
Rewrites the current Claude Code terminal prompt via a lightweight model before you submit it.

Requires the Claude Code [Beta] plugin. Use the dedicated "Claude Code" tab — running Claude Code manually in a plain terminal is not supported.
  • Type a rough prompt in the Claude Code terminal panel
  • Press Shift+Opt+Cmd+. to trigger enhancement
  • Review the enhanced prompt in the dialog, edit if needed, then click Insert
  • Hit Enter as normal to submit to Claude Code
Supports the Anthropic API and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama, etc.).
Configure at Settings → Tools → Claude Prompt Enhancer.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • Claude Code [Beta] plugin required — the enhancer now depends on the dedicated Claude Code tab; running Claude Code in a plain terminal is no longer supported.
  • Non-modal dialog — you can now see and interact with the IDE while reviewing the enhanced prompt.
  • Test Connection button in Settings to verify your API key/endpoint without running an enhancement.
  • Elapsed timer — shows seconds elapsed while the LLM call is in progress.
  • Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter shortcut to insert the enhanced prompt from anywhere in the dialog.
  • Confirmation dialog before re-enhancing when you have unsaved edits.
  • Action added to Tools menu for discoverability.
  • Fixed JSON unescape bug that corrupted prompts containing backslashes.
  • Added timeouts to git and CLI subprocesses to prevent hangs.
  • Hardened system prompt to prevent the model from answering instead of rewriting.
0.1.0
  • Initial release: keyboard-shortcut prompt enhancement with three API backends.

action.description: Rewrites the current terminal input via a lightweight model, then lets you review before inserting
